Die babylonische Religion und Mythologie. Kurze Skizze der companyof der Babylonischen Götter, die withtheir Position und Charakter in den großen religiösen andmythological und legendären arbeitet der Nation harmonisiert werden.* an der Spitze der Gesellschaft der Götter die Große Triade der Gottheiten A&u, Bel und Ea, whosespheres Einfluss zusammen die gesamte Uni umarmte bedrängt - Vers. Anu war der Gott des Himmels, Bel der Gott der Erde und der Menschheit, und Ea den Gott der abyssof Wasser unter der Erde. / An einer sehr frühen Periode inSumerian Geschichte wir diese drei Gottheiten mentionedin enge Verbindung mit finden - Alamy

URL: https://motleyturkey.com/destination/kilis-city-guide
Number of times used: 1

Kilis is located in the southern foothills of the Taurus Mountains in the west of the Euphrates River on the northern edge of the Syria Plain. The district contains areas of good agricultural land, watered by small rivers and 68% of the land area of Kilis is planted. Almost 4% of Turkey's grape production comes from Kilis. Other important agricultural products are olives, fruit, wheat, barley and tobacco. - Uluslararası İlişkiler Ofisi

The Great Ziggurat was built as a place of worship, dedicated to the moon god Nanna in the Sumerian city of Ur in ancient Mesopotamia. Today, after more than 4,000 years, the ziggurat is still well preserved in large parts as the only major remainder of Ur in present-day southern Iraq. - Department of Defense
